items.title: Travelers Sells Most Of Canada Operations To Definity For $2.4 Billion
items.author: Lekha Gupta
items.description: Travelers agreed to sell its Canadian personal and most commercial insurance operations to Definity Financial for approximately $2.4 billion. The deal will free up capital for Travelers to use for share repurchases and general corporate purposes.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article indicates that the sale of Travelers' Canadian operations to Definity Financial will free up capital for Travelers to use for share repurchases and general corporate purposes, which suggests a positive outlook for the company.
The article mentions this ETF as a way for investors to gain exposure to Travelers' stock, but does not provide any specific insights about the ETF's performance or outlook.
